title: pavonia ciliata
intro: Pavonia ciliata, also known as the silky rose mallow, is a plant species belonging to the mallow family (Malvaceae) and is commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pavonia ciliata include reducing fever, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
